ORDER SIGNED. (SEE WORD MINUTES AND FORMAL ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR# 6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2020 Continued To Sep-01-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Special Appearance: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Pro. Section 418.10 And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Notice Regarding Need To Postpone May 27 Case Management Conference
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendants InContact, Inc., Ray Hicken, Rusty Jensen, and Glen Remy's Motion to Quash Service of Summons for Lack of Personal Jurisdiction.

No appearances made by the parties. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Defendants InContact, Inc., Ray Hicken, Rusty Jensen, and Glen Remy's motion to quash service of summons for lack of personal jurisdiction is granted.

Order signed. (See Word minutes and formal order for complete ruling.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)
